maestro.name: maestro
maestro.description: Intelligent coordinator - analyze intent + read project state → select optimal command chain → execute via Skill()
maestro.description_zh: 智能协调器 — 分析用户意图，读取项目状态，选择并执行最优命令链
maestro.workflow: 入口命令，自动路由到最优命令链
maestro.workflow_zh: 所有工作流的统一入口，可路由至任意下游命令

maestro-init.name: maestro-init
maestro-init.description: Initialize project with auto state detection (empty/code/existing) — creates .workflow/ directory structure
maestro-init.description_zh: 自动检测项目状态（空项目/代码库/已有项目），创建 .workflow/ 目录结构，包含 project.md、state.json、config.json 和 specs/
maestro-init.workflow_zh: 头脑风暴之后，路线图/规格生成之前执行

maestro-plan.name: maestro-plan
maestro-plan.description: Explore, clarify, plan, check, and confirm a phase execution plan — produces plan.json with waves and task definitions
maestro-plan.description_zh: 5 阶段规划流水线：探索 → 澄清需求 → 规划 → 检查 → 确认。生成包含波次和任务定义的 plan.json
maestro-plan.workflow_zh: 项目初始化和路线图就绪后执行，为 maestro-execute 生成计划

maestro-execute.name: maestro-execute
maestro-execute.description: Execute phase plan with wave-based parallel execution and atomic commits
maestro-execute.description_zh: 按波次并行执行阶段任务，支持依赖感知调度和原子提交。消费 plan.json 生成的任务定义
maestro-execute.workflow_zh: 消费 maestro-plan 产出的 plan.json，执行完成后由 maestro-verify 验证

maestro-verify.name: maestro-verify
maestro-verify.description: Goal-Backward verification with 3-layer must-have checks, anti-pattern scan, Nyquist test coverage validation, and gap-fix plan generation
maestro-verify.description_zh: 目标回溯验证：3 层必要项检查 → 反模式扫描 → 奈奎斯特测试覆盖率审计 → 缺口修复计划生成
maestro-verify.workflow_zh: 执行完成后验证，通过后继续 quality-review 或直接 phase-transition

maestro-quick.name: maestro-quick
maestro-quick.description: Execute a quick task with workflow guarantees but skip optional agents
maestro-quick.description_zh: 快速执行单个任务，跳过规划阶段，同时保持原子提交和验证等工作流质量保证
maestro-quick.workflow: 独立使用，适合不需要完整规划流程的小任务
maestro-quick.workflow_zh: 适用场景：bug 修复、小功能、文档更新。替代 plan+execute 组合

maestro-brainstorm.name: maestro-brainstorm
maestro-brainstorm.description: Unified brainstorming with dual-mode operation — auto pipeline (multi-role synthesis) and single role analysis
maestro-brainstorm.description_zh: 双模式头脑风暴：自动模式（框架生成 → 多角色并行分析 → 综合输出）或单角色分析。输出 .brainstorming/ 目录中的结构化产物
maestro-brainstorm.workflow_zh: 工作流起点，为后续初始化和规划提供概念基础

maestro-analyze.name: maestro-analyze
maestro-analyze.description: Multi-dimensional analysis with CLI exploration, decision extraction, and intent tracking
maestro-analyze.description_zh: 多维分析：CLI 探索 + 6 维度评分 + 决策记录协议 + 意图覆盖检查。生成 analysis.md 和 context.md，用于后续规划
maestro-analyze.workflow_zh: 在头脑风暴和规划之间使用，提取关键决策和上下文

maestro-roadmap.name: maestro-roadmap
maestro-roadmap.description: Interactive roadmap creation with iterative refinement — lightweight alternative to spec-generate
maestro-roadmap.description_zh: 交互式路线图创建：需求分解 → 里程碑规划 → 迭代精化 → 阶段确认。spec-generate 的轻量级替代方案
maestro-roadmap.workflow_zh: 项目初始化之后，阶段规划之前。适合不需要完整规格文档的项目

maestro-ui-design.name: maestro-ui-design
maestro-ui-design.description: Generate UI design prototypes with multiple styles via ui-ux-pro-max — user selects winner, solidify as code reference
maestro-ui-design.description_zh: 通过 ui-ux-pro-max 生成多种风格的 UI 设计原型，用户选择最佳方案，固化为代码参考文档
maestro-ui-design.workflow_zh: 可在规划前插入 UI 设计阶段，为后续实现提供视觉参考

maestro-spec-generate.name: maestro-spec-generate
maestro-spec-generate.description: Generate specification package from idea/requirements through 7-phase document chain producing product brief, PRD, architecture, epics, and interactive roadmap
maestro-spec-generate.description_zh: 7 阶段文档链：产品简报 → PRD → 架构文档 → 史诗故事 → 用户故事 → 验收标准 → 交互式路线图。适合需要完整规格文档的项目
maestro-spec-generate.workflow_zh: 项目初始化之后，阶段规划之前。maestro-roadmap 的重量级替代方案

maestro-phase-transition.name: maestro-phase-transition
maestro-phase-transition.description: Mark current or specified phase as complete, extract learnings, advance to next phase
maestro-phase-transition.description_zh: 验证当前阶段完成标准（任务完成、验证通过、无未解决缺口），标记完成并推进到下一阶段
maestro-phase-transition.workflow_zh: 验证通过后执行，推进到下一阶段的规划

maestro-phase-add.name: maestro-phase-add
maestro-phase-add.description: Add or insert a new phase into the project roadmap with automatic renumbering
maestro-phase-add.description_zh: 向路线图追加或插入新阶段，自动重新编号后续阶段目录并初始化新阶段的 index.json
maestro-phase-add.workflow: 在路线图管理时按需使用
maestro-phase-add.workflow_zh: 管理命令，不属于主流程
flags: --after N (插入到第 N 阶段之后)

maestro-milestone-audit.name: maestro-milestone-audit
maestro-milestone-audit.description: Audit current milestone for cross-phase integration gaps
maestro-milestone-audit.description_zh: 审核当前里程碑的跨阶段集成差距，检查功能完整性和接口一致性
maestro-milestone-audit.workflow_zh: 里程碑归档前的质量门控

maestro-milestone-complete.name: maestro-milestone-complete
maestro-milestone-complete.description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next
maestro-milestone-complete.description_zh: 归档已完成的里程碑，提取经验教训，准备下一个里程碑的工作目录

spec-setup.name: spec-setup
spec-setup.description: Initialize system specs by scanning project structure and generating conventions
spec-setup.description_zh: 扫描项目结构，自动生成代码约定、架构决策记录（ADR）和技术选型规范文件，初始化 specs/ 目录
spec-setup.workflow: maestro-init 自动调用，或独立使用
spec-setup.workflow_zh: 通常由 maestro-init 自动执行，也可单独调用刷新规格

spec-add.name: spec-add
spec-add.description: Add a spec entry (bug, pattern, decision, or rule) to the appropriate specs file
spec-add.description_zh: 向知识库添加规范条目：bug（已修复的 bug 记录）、pattern（代码模式）、decision（架构决策）或 rule（约定规则）
spec-add.workflow: 随时使用，记录开发过程中的决策和模式
spec-add.workflow_zh: 持续使用命令，在执行过程中积累项目知识

spec-load.name: spec-load
spec-load.description: Load relevant specs for current context — used by agents before execution
spec-load.description_zh: 加载与当前上下文相关的规范，供代理在执行前注入上下文。支持按分类和关键词过滤
spec-load.workflow_zh: 通常由代理系统自动调用，也可手动检查当前上下文规范

spec-map.name: spec-map
spec-map.description: Analyze codebase with parallel mapper agents to produce .workflow/codebase/ documents
spec-map.description_zh: 使用并行映射代理深度分析代码库，生成 .workflow/codebase/ 下的技术注册表、功能图谱和需求映射文档
spec-map.workflow: 项目初始化或代码库变化较大时使用
spec-map.workflow_zh: 为后续规划和验证提供代码库文档基础

quality-review.name: quality-review
quality-review.description: Tiered code review (quick/standard/deep) with parallel agents, severity classification, and auto-issue creation
quality-review.description_zh: 分层代码审查：quick（5 分钟）/ standard（全面）/ deep（深度，含安全审计）。并行代理审查，自动创建 BLOCK/WARN/INFO 分级问题
quality-review.workflow_zh: 验证通过后执行，发现问题可继续 quality-test-gen 或直接 phase-transition

quality-test.name: quality-test
quality-test.description: Conversational UAT with session persistence, auto-diagnosis, and gap-plan closure loop
quality-test.description_zh: 对话式用户验收测试：会话持久化 → 自动诊断失败 → 差距修复计划 → 闭环执行。支持烟雾测试和自动修复模式
quality-test.workflow_zh: 测试生成之后运行，发现失败可触发 quality-debug

quality-test-gen.name: quality-test-gen
quality-test-gen.description: Generate missing tests with TDD/E2E classification and RED-GREEN methodology
quality-test-gen.description_zh: 生成缺失测试：分析代码库识别测试缺口 → TDD（单元/集成）或 E2E 分类 → RED-GREEN-REFACTOR 方法论
quality-test-gen.workflow_zh: 代码审查发现测试缺口后生成测试，然后运行 quality-test 验证

quality-debug.name: quality-debug
quality-debug.description: Parallel hypothesis-driven debugging with UAT integration and structured root cause collection
quality-debug.description_zh: 并行假设驱动调试：多个并行代理同时验证不同假设，结构化根因收集，可从 UAT 失败直接触发
quality-debug.workflow_zh: 测试失败后的调试闭环

quality-integration-test.name: quality-integration-test
quality-integration-test.description: Self-iterating integration test cycle with reflection-driven strategy and L0-L3 progressive layers
quality-integration-test.description_zh: 自迭代集成测试循环：反思驱动的自适应策略引擎 + L0（冒烟）→ L1（API）→ L2（工作流）→ L3（完整系统）渐进式测试层
quality-integration-test.workflow_zh: 在单元测试通过后进行集成验证

quality-refactor.name: quality-refactor
quality-refactor.description: Tech debt reduction with reflection-driven iteration
quality-refactor.description_zh: 技术债务减少：识别债务 → 评估影响 → 制定重构计划 → 反思驱动迭代执行，保证现有测试全部通过
quality-refactor.workflow_zh: 代码审查发现技术债务后触发，重构后需重新测试

quality-sync.name: quality-sync
quality-sync.description: Sync codebase docs after code changes — traces git diff through component/feature/requirement impact chain
quality-sync.description_zh: 代码变更后同步文档：检测 git diff → 追踪组件/功能/需求影响链 → 更新 .workflow/codebase/ 受影响文档
quality-sync.workflow: 任何代码变更后使用，保持文档与代码同步
quality-sync.workflow_zh: 维护命令，确保代码库文档始终反映最新代码状态

manage-status.name: manage-status
manage-status.description: Display project dashboard with phase progress, active tasks, and next steps
manage-status.description_zh: 显示项目仪表板：当前阶段进度、活跃任务状态、里程碑完成度和推荐的下一步操作
manage-status.workflow: 随时使用，查看项目整体状态
manage-status.workflow_zh: 状态查询命令，不影响工作流

manage-memory.name: manage-memory
manage-memory.description: Manage memory entries — workflow memory (.workflow/memory/) and system memory (~/.claude/projects/*/memory/)
manage-memory.description_zh: 管理两类记忆存储：工作流记忆（.workflow/memory/，项目级）和系统记忆（~/.claude/projects/*/memory/，跨项目）
manage-memory.workflow: 随时使用，管理和维护项目知识库

manage-memory-capture.name: manage-memory-capture
manage-memory-capture.description: Capture session memory (compact or tips) into .workflow/memory/ with JSON index
manage-memory-capture.description_zh: 将当前会话的经验捕获为记忆：compact（会话压缩摘要）或 tip（单个专业提示）。带 JSON 索引便于后续检索
manage-memory-capture.workflow: 阶段或会话结束时使用，沉淀经验
manage-memory-capture.workflow_zh: 在 maestro-phase-transition 或会话结束时使用

manage-codebase-rebuild.name: manage-codebase-rebuild
manage-codebase-rebuild.description: Full rebuild of codebase documentation — scans project, builds doc-index.json, generates all tech-registry and feature-maps
manage-codebase-rebuild.description_zh: 全量重建 .workflow/codebase/ 文档系统：扫描整个项目 → 识别组件/功能/需求/ADR → 并行生成所有文档产物（覆盖已有文档）
manage-codebase-rebuild.workflow: 项目初始化后或代码库大幅变更后使用
manage-codebase-rebuild.workflow_zh: 重量级操作，覆盖现有文档。增量更新请用 manage-codebase-refresh

manage-codebase-refresh.name: manage-codebase-refresh
manage-codebase-refresh.description: Incremental refresh of codebase docs based on recent changes
manage-codebase-refresh.description_zh: 增量刷新代码库文档：检测变更文件 → 识别受影响文档 → 仅重新生成必要部分。比全量重建快得多
manage-codebase-refresh.workflow: 日常代码变更后使用，替代 manage-codebase-rebuild 的轻量级方案

manage-issue.name: manage-issue
manage-issue.description: Issue CRUD operations — create, query, update, close, and link issues to tasks
manage-issue.description_zh: 交互式问题管理：创建（记录 bug/功能需求）、查询（按状态/标签过滤）、更新、关闭、链接到任务
manage-issue.workflow: 质量审查或测试发现问题后使用
manage-issue.workflow_zh: 配合 quality-review 和 quality-debug 使用

manage-issue-discover.name: manage-issue-discover
manage-issue-discover.description: Automated issue discovery — multi-perspective analysis or prompt-driven exploration
manage-issue-discover.description_zh: 自动发现潜在问题：多视角分析（安全/性能/可用性/可维护性）或提示驱动探索。批量创建待跟踪问题
manage-issue-discover.workflow: 主动质量扫描时使用，或在里程碑审计前运行
manage-issue-discover.workflow_zh: 配合 maestro-milestone-audit 使用，发现集成差距
flags: [by-prompt "what to look for"] (可选，提示驱动模式)

team-lifecycle-v4.name: team-lifecycle-v4
team-lifecycle-v4.description: Full lifecycle team skill — specification → planning → implementation → testing → review with clean multi-agent architecture
team-lifecycle-v4.description_zh: 完整软件开发生命周期的多智能体编排：规格 → 规划 → 实现 → 测试 → 代码审查，采用清晰的角色分离架构
team-lifecycle-v4.workflow: 适用于需要完整团队协作的大型功能开发
team-lifecycle-v4.workflow_zh: 替代单 agent 顺序执行，实现并行多角色协作

team-coordinate.name: team-coordinate
team-coordinate.description: Universal team coordination skill with dynamic role generation — analyze task → generate role-specs → dispatch → execute → deliver
team-coordinate.description_zh: 通用团队协调：分析任务 → 动态生成角色规范 → 分派 → 执行 → 交付。协调器是唯一内置角色，所有工作角色在运行时动态生成
team-coordinate.workflow: 适用于任意需要多角色协作的任务
team-coordinate.workflow_zh: 最灵活的团队技能，角色完全按任务需求动态创建

team-executor.name: team-executor
team-executor.description: Lightweight session execution skill — resumes existing team sessions for pure execution via team-worker agents
team-executor.description_zh: 轻量级执行技能：加载现有会话 → 协调状态 → 启动 team-worker 代理执行。无分析、无角色生成，纯执行
team-executor.workflow: 配合 team-coordinate 使用，用于恢复中断的会话
team-executor.workflow_zh: team-coordinate 的执行续集，用于会话恢复

team-testing.name: team-testing
team-testing.description: Multi-agent testing team — strategist → generator → executor → analyst with progressive L1/L2/L3 coverage and Generator-Critic loops
team-testing.description_zh: 多智能体测试团队：策略师 → 生成器 → 执行器 → 分析师。Generator-Critic 循环确保覆盖率收敛，L1/L2/L3 渐进式测试层
team-testing.workflow: 替代 quality-test-gen + quality-test 组合，适合复杂测试场景
team-testing.workflow_zh: 专用测试团队，比单命令测试更全面

team-review.name: team-review
team-review.description: Multi-agent code review — scanner → reviewer → fixer with 4-dimension analysis (SEC/COR/PRF/MNT)
team-review.description_zh: 多智能体代码审查：扫描器（工具链+LLM）→ 审查者（深度分析，根因溯源）→ 修复者（自动修复，失败回滚）。4 维度：安全/正确性/性能/可维护性
team-review.workflow: 替代 quality-review 命令，提供更深度的多角色协作审查
team-review.workflow_zh: 专用审查团队，比单命令审查更彻底

team-quality-assurance.name: team-quality-assurance
team-quality-assurance.description: Full closed-loop QA team — scout → strategist → generator → executor → analyst with discovery, testing, and full modes
team-quality-assurance.description_zh: 完整闭环 QA 团队：侦察者（问题发现）→ 策略师 → 生成器 → 执行器 → 分析师。支持 discovery/testing/full 三种模式
team-quality-assurance.workflow: 替代 manage-issue-discover + quality-test-gen + quality-test 组合
team-quality-assurance.workflow_zh: 最完整的 QA 解决方案，覆盖问题发现到测试验证的全流程

team-tech-debt.name: team-tech-debt
team-tech-debt.description: Tech debt governance team — scanner → assessor → planner → executor → validator with 5 debt dimensions
team-tech-debt.description_zh: 系统性技术债务治理：扫描 → 评估影响 → 制定修复计划 → 执行重构 → 验证结果。5 个债务维度：代码质量/架构/安全/性能/文档
team-tech-debt.workflow: 替代 quality-refactor 命令，适合大规模技术债务治理
team-tech-debt.workflow_zh: 专用债务治理团队，比单命令重构更系统
